Title: BE-D1 · Campaigns schema migration (scope trimmed from original)
Description:
## BE-D1 — Campaigns schema migration

**Role:** You are implementing this as an iPix engineer. Stack: Next.js `app/`, Supabase remote-only, one concern per PR. `ipix-supabase` and `task-verifier` skills govern this work; load them before coding.

**Plain English:** Add `campaigns` + `campaign_deliverables` tables so the Campaigns UI (SCR-07) has data to render. Today no `public.campaigns` table exists — Campaigns route at `/app/campaigns` shows a `SectionPlaceholder` stub.

**Context — what's broken today:**

* Remote has **zero** campaign tables (MCP verified 2026-07-06)
* `crm_deals.campaign_id` column exists but is **orphaned** — no FK target
* Campaigns.v2.image-first.dc.html shows 4 statuses (`Planning`, `Active`, `Live`, `Complete`) with progress bars, date ranges, and deliverable checklists — none of which can be stored
* Creative Director agent cannot reference campaign context

**Mistake we prevent:** Do NOT add campaign data to an existing table. Do NOT create a non-org-scoped table. Do NOT skip RLS — every table in `public` gets org-scoped RLS.

**SSOT:** `Universal-design-prompt-new/tasks/backend/BE-D1-campaigns-schema-IPI-268.md`

**Blocked by:** [IPI-257](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-257/design-074-cloudinary-media-pipeline-upload-to-delivery) (Cloudinary Media Pipeline — optional, FK to cover images)
**Unblocks:** [IPI-249](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-249/design-058-campaign-management-react-parity-workspace) (SCR-07 Campaigns UI), [IPI-297](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-297/design-091-campaign-performance-react-port-drill-down) (SCR-17 Campaign Performance), [IPI-399](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-399/be-d2-analytics-views-rpcs) (BE-D2 Analytics views), crm_deals.campaign_id FK

**Skills:** `ipix-supabase` · `task-verifier`

---

## User stories

> As an **Operator**, when I open Campaigns, I see a list of campaigns with name, status, date range, and progress so I can understand what's running.

> As an **Operator**, when I click a campaign, I see its brand context, deliverables checklist, and timeline so I can manage production without switching tools.

> As a **Creative Director agent**, when a user asks "What campaigns are active for Brand X?", I can query `campaigns` + `campaign_deliverables` so I give accurate answers.

---

## Migration SQL

### Helper function: `set_updated_at()`

```sql
create or replace function public.set_updated_at()
returns trigger as $$
begin
  new.updated_at = now();
  return new;
end;
$$ language plpgsql;
```

### Helper function: `check_campaign_org_consistency()`

```sql
create or replace function public.check_campaign_org_consistency()
returns trigger as $$
begin
  if new.org_id != (select org_id from public.brands where id = new.brand_id) then
    raise exception 'campaign.org_id (%) must match brand.org_id (%)', new.org_id, (select org_id from public.brands where id = new.brand_id);
  end if;
  return new;
end;
$$ language plpgsql;
```

### Type: `campaign_status`

```sql
create type public.campaign_status as enum ('planning', 'active', 'live', 'complete');
```

Matches DC design: Planning → Active → Live → Complete.

### Type: `deliverable_status`

```sql
create type public.deliverable_status as enum ('pending', 'in_progress', 'review', 'approved');
```

### Note on `campaign_objective_type`

Already exists on remote — do not recreate:

```
campaign_objective_type: brand_awareness, product_launch, conversion, retention, community, seo_discovery, ecommerce_direct
```

### Table: `campaigns`

```sql
create table public.campaigns (
  id          uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  org_id      uuid not null references public.organizations(id) on delete cascade,
  brand_id    uuid not null references public.brands(id) on delete cascade,
  name        text not null,
  status      public.campaign_status not null default 'planning',
  objective   public.campaign_objective_type,
  start_date  date,
  end_date    date,
  cover_url   text,                          -- Cloudinary URL, set via RPC not direct UPDATE
  created_at  timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at  timestamptz not null default now()
);
```

### Table: `campaign_deliverables`

```sql
create table public.campaign_deliverables (
  id          uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  campaign_id uuid not null references public.campaigns(id) on delete cascade,
  phase       smallint not null check (phase between 1 and 12),
  label       text not null,                                      -- e.g. "Brief", "Moodboard"
  status      public.deliverable_status not null default 'pending',
  due_date    date,
  assigned_to uuid references public.profiles(id),
  created_at  timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at  timestamptz not null default now(),
  constraint uq_campaign_deliverables_phase unique (campaign_id, phase)  -- prevents duplicate phase ordering
);
```

### Indexes

```sql
create index idx_campaigns_org_id on public.campaigns(org_id);
create index idx_campaigns_brand_id on public.campaigns(brand_id);
create index idx_campaigns_status on public.campaigns(status) where status in ('planning', 'active');
create index idx_campaign_deliverables_campaign on public.campaign_deliverables(campaign_id, phase);
```

### Triggers

```sql
create trigger set_campaigns_updated_at
  before update on public.campaigns
  for each row execute function public.set_updated_at();

create trigger set_campaign_deliverables_updated_at
  before update on public.campaign_deliverables
  for each row execute function public.set_updated_at();

create trigger check_campaign_org_consistency
  before insert or update on public.campaigns
  for each row execute function public.check_campaign_org_consistency();
```

### RLS

```sql
alter table public.campaigns enable row level security;
alter table public.campaign_deliverables enable row level security;

-- campaigns
create policy "campaigns_select_org_member" on public.campaigns
  for select using (is_org_member(org_id));

create policy "campaigns_insert_org_member" on public.campaigns
  for insert with check (
    is_org_member(org_id)
    and (select auth.uid()) = (select user_id from public.brands where id = brand_id)
  );

create policy "campaigns_update_org_member" on public.campaigns
  for update using (is_org_member(org_id))
  with check (
    is_org_member(org_id)
    and (select auth.uid()) = (select user_id from public.brands where id = brand_id)
  );

create policy "campaigns_delete_org_member" on public.campaigns
  for delete using (
    is_org_member(org_id)
    and (select auth.uid()) = (select user_id from public.brands where id = brand_id)
  );

-- campaign_deliverables
create policy "campaign_deliverables_select_org_member" on public.campaign_deliverables
  for select using (
    is_org_member((select org_id from public.campaigns where id = campaign_id))
  );

create policy "campaign_deliverables_insert_owner" on public.campaign_deliverables
  for insert with check (
    is_org_member((select org_id from public.campaigns where id = campaign_id))
    and (select auth.uid()) = (select user_id from public.brands where id = (select brand_id from public.campaigns where id = campaign_id))
  );

create policy "campaign_deliverables_update_assigned_or_owner" on public.campaign_deliverables
  for update using (
    is_org_member((select org_id from public.campaigns where id = campaign_id))
  )
  with check (
    (select auth.uid()) = assigned_to
    or (select auth.uid()) = (select user_id from public.brands where id = (select brand_id from public.campaigns where id = campaign_id))
  );

create policy "campaign_deliverables_delete_owner" on public.campaign_deliverables
  for delete using (
    is_org_member((select org_id from public.campaigns where id = campaign_id))
    and (select auth.uid()) = (select user_id from public.brands where id = (select brand_id from public.campaigns where id = campaign_id))
  );
```

<example name="allowed_select">
-- Operator sees their org's campaigns (RLS filters by is_org_member)
select * from campaigns;
</example>

<example name="denied_cross_org">
-- Cross-org SELECT via anon/authenticated client returns 0 rows
-- (RLS enforces is_org_member on all operations)
-- NOT testable via supabase db query --linked (runs as service role, bypasses RLS)
-- Test via a supabase-js client authenticated as a non-member user
</example>

### FK repair: `crm_deals.campaign_id`

```sql
alter table crm_deals add constraint fk_crm_deals_campaign
  foreign key (campaign_id) references public.campaigns(id) on delete set null;
```

All SQL above is one atomic migration file.

---

## Mermaid diagrams

### ERD

```mermaid
erDiagram
    organizations ||--o{ campaigns : has
    brands ||--o{ campaigns : has
    campaigns ||--o{ campaign_deliverables : contains
    campaigns ||--o{ crm_deals : references
    campaign_deliverables }o--|| profiles : assigned

    campaigns {
        uuid id PK
        uuid org_id FK
        uuid brand_id FK
        text name
        campaign_status status
        campaign_objective_type objective
        date start_date
        date end_date
        text cover_url
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }

    campaign_deliverables {
        uuid id PK
        uuid campaign_id FK
        smallint phase
        text label
        deliverable_status status
        date due_date
        uuid assigned_to FK
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
```

### Migration workflow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Dev
    participant CLI as Supabase CLI
    participant Remote as Supabase Remote
    participant App as Next.js app/

    Dev->>CLI: supabase migration new ipi268_campaigns_schema
    CLI->>Dev: migration file scaffolded
    Dev->>Dev: write types + tables + triggers + RLS + FK SQL
    Dev->>CLI: supabase db push --linked
    CLI->>Remote: apply migration
    Remote-->>CLI: success
    CLI->>Dev: verify via supabase db query --linked
    Dev->>CLI: npm run supabase:types
    CLI->>App: regenerate types.ts
    Dev->>CLI: npm run supabase:verify-rls
    CLI->>Remote: run RLS probe script
    Remote-->>CLI: 🟢 all probes
    Dev->>Dev: PR (migration-only, one concern)
```

---

## Acceptance criteria

* **A — New tables exist:** `select to_regclass('public.campaigns')` returns `campaigns`; same for `campaign_deliverables`
  * *proof:* `supabase db query --linked "select to_regclass('public.campaigns') is not null as exists;"` returns `true`
* **B — Types created:** `campaign_status` and `deliverable_status` enums exist
  * *proof:* `supabase db query --linked "select typname from pg_type where typname in ('campaign_status', 'deliverable_status');"` returns 2 rows
* **C — RLS policies exist:** 9 policies across 2 tables
  * *proof:* `supabase db query --linked "select tablename, policyname from pg_policies where tablename in ('campaigns', 'campaign_deliverables');"` lists all policies
* **D — Indexes present:** 4 named indexes
  * *proof:* `supabase db query --linked "select indexname from pg_indexes where tablename in ('campaigns', 'campaign_deliverables');"` lists idx_campaigns_org_id, idx_campaigns_brand_id, idx_campaigns_status, idx_campaign_deliverables_campaign
* **E — FK repaired:** `crm_deals.campaign_id` has constraint
  * *proof:* `supabase db query --linked "select conname from pg_constraint where conrelid = 'crm_deals'::regclass and confrelid = 'campaigns'::regclass;"` returns `fk_crm_deals_campaign`
* **F — Triggers present:** 3 triggers exist
  * *proof:* `supabase db query --linked "select tgname from pg_trigger where tgname in ('set_campaigns_updated_at', 'set_campaign_deliverables_updated_at', 'check_campaign_org_consistency');"` returns 3 rows
* **G —** `verify-rls` **green:** `infisical run -- npm run supabase:verify-rls` exit 0
* **H — Types regenerated:** `cd app && npm run supabase:types` produces updated `src/types/supabase.ts` with campaign types
  * *proof:* `grep campaign_status app/src/types/supabase.ts` returns match

---

## Technical notes

**Do NOT:**

* Mix this migration with React code in the same PR — migration-only PR
* Skip RLS on either table — `is_org_member` on every operation
* Cover image upload in this PR — `cover_url` column exists but must only be written via RPC ([IPI-257](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-257/design-074-cloudinary-media-pipeline-upload-to-delivery))
* Create a non-org-scoped enum — campaign and deliverable statuses are org-scoped
* Add `campaign_id` FK as `on delete cascade` on `crm_deals` — use `on delete set null` (deals survive campaign deletion)
* Run `supabase db query --linked` (service role) to test RLS — it bypasses row-level security

**Out of scope:**

* Campaign UI (SCR-07 / [IPI-249](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-249/design-058-campaign-management-react-parity-workspace)) — separate React PR
* Campaign performance analytics (SCR-17 / [IPI-297](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-297/design-091-campaign-performance-react-port-drill-down)) — needs BE-D2
* Campaign cover image upload — Cloudinary pipeline ([IPI-257](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-257/design-074-cloudinary-media-pipeline-upload-to-delivery))
* Creative Director agent route wiring — after UI ships
* Add/remove milestones or template phases — deliverable phases are flexible by ordinal

---

## Completion steps

- [ ] **A — Write migration:** Create `supabase/migrations/20260707100000_ipi268_campaigns_schema.sql` with types → functions → tables → indexes → triggers → RLS → FK repair
  * *proof:* file exists and `supabase migration list --linked` shows new migration
- [ ] **B — Apply to remote:** `supabase db push --linked`
  * *proof:* AC A-G all pass
- [ ] **C — Regenerate types:** `cd app && npm run supabase:types`
  * *proof:* grep `campaign_status` `app/src/types/supabase.ts` returns match
- [ ] **D — Verify RLS:** `infisical run -- npm run supabase:verify-rls`
  * *proof:* exit 0, all probes 🟢
- [ ] **E — Open migration-only PR** with title `feat(ipi-268): add campaigns + campaign_deliverables schema`
  * *proof:* PR checklist includes verify steps A–H

---

supabase db query --linked "select to_regclass('public.campaigns') is not null as campaigns_exists, to_regclass('public.campaign_deliverables') is not null as deliverables_exists;"

# Types exist

# RLS policies exist

# Indexes

# FK repaired

# Triggers exist

Title: FIX · Mastra public.mastra_* RLS hardening
Description:
## FIX · Phase 2.1 — Mastra RLS hardening

**Audit:** App F-002 / Supa F-001 · **Branch:** `ipi/mastra-rls-hardening` · **PR type:** migration-only

**Problem:** 33 `public.mastra_*` tables — RLS disabled; anon + authenticated had full CRUD grants (PostgREST exposure).

### Fix

* `ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY` on all 33 `public.mastra_*` tables
* `REVOKE ALL ON TABLE … FROM anon, authenticated` on each table
* **No anon/auth policies** — default deny (grants revoked + RLS with zero permissive policies)
* Mastra runtime uses `postgres` pooler via `DATABASE_URL` (`rolbypassrls = true`) — server-side access unchanged

**Migration:** `supabase/migrations/20260628173206_mastra_rls_hardening.sql`

### Rollback (required in PR body)

1. `DISABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY` on all 33 `public.mastra_*` tables
2. Restore anon/auth grants only if emergency rollback requires exact prior state:

   ```sql
   GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, REFERENCES, TRIGGER, TRUNCATE
     ON TABLE public.mastra_<name> TO anon, authenticated;
   ```
3. If Mastra breaks: apply reverse within 15 min

---

## Testing to run

### 0. Pre-migration discovery (do not write migration blind)

Save outputs under `docs/audit/evidence/2026-06-28/ipi-227-mastra-rls/` (docs-only PR, separate from migration PR):

```bash
mkdir -p docs/audit/evidence/2026-06-28/ipi-227-mastra-rls

# Use DATABASE_URL from app/.env.local (pooler) or Supabase MCP execute_sql
psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "
select tablename from pg_tables
where schemaname = 'public' and tablename like 'mastra_%'
order by tablename;
" | tee docs/audit/evidence/2026-06-28/ipi-227-mastra-rls/01-mastra-table-list.txt

psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "
select tablename, rowsecurity from pg_tables
where schemaname = 'public' and tablename like 'mastra_%'
order by tablename;
" | tee docs/audit/evidence/2026-06-28/ipi-227-mastra-rls/02-rls-before.txt

psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "
select grantee, table_name, privilege_type
from information_schema.role_table_grants
where table_schema = 'public' and table_name like 'mastra_%'
  and grantee in ('anon', 'authenticated')
order by table_name, grantee, privilege_type;
" | tee docs/audit/evidence/2026-06-28/ipi-227-mastra-rls/03-anon-auth-grants-before.txt

# Pre-push sanity: pooler role bypasses RLS
psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "
select current_user, rolbypassrls from pg_roles where rolname = current_user;
"
```

**Pass when (before):**

### 2. Post-migration DB checks

order by tablename;

Description:
## FIX · Phase 2.2 — Shoot commit via Next.js API + RPC (**Path B only**)

**Status:** ✅ **Done** — merged [PR #136](<https://github.com/amo-tech-ai/lumina-studio/pull/136>) @ `9de36a8` (2026-06-28)  
**Audit:** App F-003 · **Branch:** `ipi/shoot-commit-rpc`  
**Verification:** [docs/audit/june-28-audt.md](<../../audit/june-28-audt.md>) — **94/100**

**Locked path (shipped):**

```text
Browser → POST /api/shoots/commit → withOperatorAuth → commitShootDraft → service_role RPC commit_shoot_draft → shoot.*
```

**Follow-up (not IPI-228 scope):**

* Retire `supabase/functions/save-approved-shoot-draft/` → **IPI-231** edge inventory
* V-005 live wizard smoke → **IPI-233** (blocked by environment)

---

## Shipped evidence (2026-06-28, `main` @ `9de36a8`)

| Probe | Result |
| -- | -- |
| `app/src/app/api/shoots/commit/route.ts` | ✅ `withOperatorAuth`, validation, brand RLS, RPC |
| `app/src/lib/shoot/commit-shoot-draft.ts` | ✅ shared helper (route + Mastra) |
| `app/src/app/(operator)/app/shoots/new/page.tsx` | ✅ POST `/api/shoots/commit` |
| `app/src/mastra/tools/saveApprovedShootDraft.ts` | ✅ `commitShootDraft` — **no** `callEdgeFunction` |
| Route + lib tests | ✅ **10/10** (6 route + 4 lib) |
| CI | ✅ `app-build` + `supabase-web015` green on merge |
| Edge fn directory | ⏭️ corpse remains in repo → IPI-231 |

---

## RPC argument map (SSOT: `app/src/types/supabase.ts`)

| HTTP body field | RPC arg | Type |
| -- | -- | -- |
| `brand_id` | `p_brand_id` | uuid |
| `shoot_name` | `p_name` | text |
| `brief` | `p_brief` | text? |
| `channels` | `p_target_channels` | text[] |
| `approved_budget` | `p_estimated_budget` | numeric |
| `budget_breakdown` | `p_budget_breakdown` | jsonb? |
| (from operator) | `p_created_by` | uuid? |
| `deliverables[]` | `p_deliverables` | jsonb |
| `shots[]` | `p_shots` | jsonb |

RPC returns: `{ shoot_id: uuid }` (jsonb).

**Auth pattern:**

* Brand access → user-scoped Supabase client (RLS)
* `commit_shoot_draft` → service_role client only

---

Title: SHOOT-UX-000 · CopilotKit v2 + AG-UI chat foundation
Description:
# Purpose

Establish the CopilotKit **v2 + AG-UI** runtime and hook conventions ONCE, so all 13 shoot issues ([IPI2-100](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI2-100/dash-010-d5-shoots-grid-operator-command-center-shoot-tile)/104/105/106/107/113/114/115/116/117/118/119/120) are built v2-native and never import a deprecated v1 API. Hard gate: no CopilotKit feature work merges until this foundation lands.

# Background — Audit of `integrations/mastra`

`github/CopilotKit/examples/integrations/mastra` was audited and is **already v2**:

| Layer | What the example uses | Status |
| -- | -- | -- |
| Provider | `CopilotKit` from `@copilotkit/react-core/v2` | ✅ v2 |
| Hooks | `useAgent`, `useFrontendTool`, `useThreads` (from `/v2`) | ✅ v2 |
| Runtime | `createCopilotEndpoint` from `@copilotkit/runtime/v2` | ✅ v2 |
| Agent bridge | `MastraAgent` from `@ag-ui/mastra` | ✅ v2 |
| Protocol | AG-UI (SSE) via `@ag-ui/client` / `@ag-ui/core` | ✅ v2 |
| Packages | `@copilotkit/react-core` + `@copilotkit/runtime` pinned `1.60.0` — v2 APIs under `/v2` subpath | ✅ |

**Conclusion:** "Upgrade to v2" = import from `/v2` subpaths, use AG-UI + Mastra bridge, use v2 hook names. This example is the ONLY starting reference. Do not copy deprecated APIs from older canvas/showcase examples.

# Authoritative v1 → v2 Hook Mapping

Repo source of truth: `.claude/skills/copilotkit/references/upgrade/ipix-v2-conventions.md`

| v1 (do NOT use) | v2 (use this) |
| -- | -- |
| `useCoAgent` | `useAgent` — read `agent.state`, write `agent.setState` |
| `useCopilotReadable` | `useAgentContext` |
| `useCopilotAction` | `useFrontendTool` |
| `useCopilotAction({ render })` / `useCoAgentStateRender` | `useRenderToolCall` |
| `useLangGraphInterrupt` | `useInterrupt` ✅ (already used in issues) |
| `useCopilotChat` | `useAgent` + `useSuggestions` |
| `useCopilotChatSuggestions` | `useConfigureSuggestions` + `useSuggestions` |
| `CopilotTextarea` | removed — plain `<textarea>` + `useFrontendTool` |
| `CopilotKit` from `@copilotkit/react-core` | `CopilotKit` from `@copilotkit/react-core/v2` |
| `CopilotRuntime` (adapters) + `copilotKitEndpoint()` | `CopilotRuntime` (agents) + `createCopilotEndpoint()` (`@copilotkit/runtime/v2`) |
| `LangGraphAgent` endpoint | `MastraAgent` (`@ag-ui/mastra`) |

> The 13 shoot issues' snippets show v1 names (`useCoAgent`, `useCopilotReadable`) — illustrative only. **This task's mapping supersedes them.** `useInterrupt` stays as written.

# iPix Architecture Invariants (kept under v2)

* **Center panel = workspace** — editable artifact (shot list grid, deliverables, gallery), driven by `useAgent` shared state.
* **Right panel = AI intelligence** — `CopilotSidebar` from `/v2`; advisory/alerts/gaps only.
* **No silent writes** — every durable write goes through a Supabase edge function after a `useInterrupt` HITL approval. Agents may only INSERT into draft / `ai_*` tables.
* **AG-UI streaming** — agent state streams via `@ag-ui/mastra` into `useAgent.state`. Never poll.

# Runtime Setup (from the example)

```ts
import { CopilotRuntime, createCopilotEndpoint } from "@copilotkit/runtime/v2";
import { MastraAgent } from "@ag-ui/mastra";

const runtime = new CopilotRuntime({
  agents: {
    "production-planner": new MastraAgent({ /* mastra client → port 4111 */ }),
    "creative-director":  new MastraAgent({ /* … */ }),
  },
});
export const app = createCopilotEndpoint({ runtime, basePath: "/api/copilotkit" });
```

# Steps to Complete

1. **Read the conventions doc** — `.claude/skills/copilotkit/references/upgrade/ipix-v2-conventions.md` and the skill's `references/upgrade/upgrade.md`.
2. **Add dependencies** — `@copilotkit/react-core@^1.60`, `@copilotkit/runtime@^1.60`, `@ag-ui/client`, `@ag-ui/core`, `@ag-ui/mastra`.
3. **Wire the provider** — wrap `/app/shoots*` in `CopilotKit` from `@copilotkit/react-core/v2`; import `@copilotkit/react-core/v2/styles.css`.
4. **Stand up the runtime** — `createCopilotEndpoint` + `MastraAgent` bridge to the Mastra dev server (port 4111). Confirm AG-UI SSE handshake.
5. **Right-panel shell** — `CopilotSidebar` (v2) as the right AI panel; center stays the workspace.
6. **Add an ESLint guard** — fail the build on any deprecated v1 import (`useCoAgent`, `useCopilotReadable`, `useCopilotAction`, `CopilotTextarea`, `@copilotkit/react-core` root, `copilotKitEndpoint`). `no-restricted-imports` + `no-restricted-syntax`.
7. **Smoke test** — one `useAgent` round-trip + one `useInterrupt` approval gate end-to-end.
8. **Verify no silent writes** — smoke-test approval routes through an edge function, not a client insert.

# What NOT to Do

* Do NOT import from `@copilotkit/react-core` root (v1) — always `/v2`.
* Do NOT use any v1 hook in the left column above.
* Do NOT migrate to `CopilotKitProvider` — `CopilotKit` (from `/v2`) is the bridge that accepts all provider props.
* Do NOT copy GraphQL runtime / service-adapter patterns from older examples.

# MCP Tools

| MCP Tool | When |
| -- | -- |
| `mcp__claude_ai_copilotkit__search-docs` | Confirm current v2 hook signatures |
| `mcp__claude_ai_copilotkit__search-ag-ui-docs` | AG-UI SSE protocol + Mastra bridge |
| `mcp__claude_ai_copilotkit__explore-code` | Read `integrations/mastra` v2 wiring |

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Provider, hooks, and runtime all import from `/v2` subpaths
- [ ] AG-UI + `MastraAgent` bridge live; SSE streaming confirmed
- [ ] `useAgent` state round-trip works; `useInterrupt` gate works
- [ ] ESLint blocks every deprecated v1 import (build fails on violation)
- [ ] Smoke-test write goes through an edge function (no silent write)
- [ ] `ipix-v2-conventions.md` linked from all shoot issues

# Definition of Done

- [ ] `npm run build` + `npm run lint` pass with the v1-import guard active
- [ ] Conventions doc is the referenced standard
- [ ] Blocks cleared for [IPI2-114](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI2-114/shoot-ux-005-production-planner-agents-hitl-workflows)/115/116 to begin CopilotKit work

# Skills

Use: `/copilotkit` (upgrade reference) `/mastra` `/frontend-design` `/ipix-supabase` `/ipix-task-lifecycle`

**Reference (local):** `github/CopilotKit/examples/integrations/mastra` (already v2 — the only starting reference)
**Conventions:** `.claude/skills/copilotkit/references/upgrade/ipix-v2-conventions.md`

**Blocks:** all 13 shoot CopilotKit issues

Title: IPI-BI-P0 — Fix Brand Onboarding Orchestration and Profile Persistence
Description:
# IPI-BI-P0 — Fix Brand Onboarding Orchestration and Profile Persistence

**Goal:** Fix broken onboarding data flow so one org-linked brand row receives flat `ai_profile` fields and four base scores — before Firecrawl, schema v2, agents, or Hub v2.

**MVP proof:** #6 — operator onboarding → Brand Hub shows tagline, scores, DNA badge.

**Audit:** `docs/brand-intelligence/audit/01-linear-audit.md` (2026-06-25)

## Verdict (pre-flight)

**Direction: correct.** Client order is wrong today; edge `brandId` path mostly exists but needs two hardening fixes (profile merge + score upsert prerequisites).

## Edge function pre-flight (verified in repo)

| Check | Status | Location |
| -- | -- | -- |
| Accepts `brandId` in POST body | ✅ | `brand-intelligence/index.ts:183, 199-202` |
| UPDATE existing brand when `brandId` set | ✅ | `index.ts:344-371` |
| Skips INSERT when `brandId` set | ✅ | `if (brandId) { update } else { insert }` |
| Upserts 4 scores on same `brand_id` | ✅ | `index.ts:391-407` |
| Merge preserves onboarding form fields | ❌ | Update **replaces** `ai_profile` — wipes industry/goal/instagram |
| `UNIQUE(brand_id, score_type)` for upsert | ❌ | Missing in migrations — upsert may duplicate/fail |
| `brand_scores` UPDATE RLS policy | ❌ | Missing — upsert update leg blocked under user JWT |

**Conclusion:** [IPI-46](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-46/ipi-bi-p0-fix-brand-onboarding-orchestration-and-profile-persistence) includes **client orchestration + edge merge fix + minimal score migration** (not full schema v2).

## Out of scope (do NOT touch in this PR)

* Firecrawl / [IPI-24](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-24/ipi-bi-001-brand-intelligence-firecrawl-integration)
* Full schema v2 tables / [IPI-26](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-26/ipi-bi-003-brand-intelligence-supabase-schema-v2) (except minimal `brand_scores` fix below)
* Graphify, Hub v2 tabs, Mastra agents/workflows

## Correct orchestration

```text
createOrgAndBrandShell()          → org + brand with org_id, form metadata only
↓
brand-intelligence({ brandId, url, brand_name })
↓
edge fn UPDATE brands.ai_profile    → merge Gemini profile + existing form fields
↓
edge fn UPSERT brand_scores ×4      → visual, audience, consistency, commerce_readiness
↓
redirect /app/brand/[brandId]
```

## Bugs to fix

1. **Client order** — `onboarding/page.tsx` calls edge **before** `createOrgAndBrand`, no `brandId`
2. **Envelope mismatch** — stores full `fnData`; Hub reads flat `profile.tagline`
3. **Client DNA insert** — `onboarding.ts` inserts bogus `dna_readiness=0`
4. **Edge profile wipe** — UPDATE path must merge: `{ ...existing.ai_profile, ...aiProfile }`
5. **Score upsert prerequisites** — add `UNIQUE(brand_id, score_type)` + UPDATE RLS on `brand_scores`
6. **Hub DNA badge** — compute AVG(base 4 scores); show scores grid when `length >= 1`

## Files (in scope)

* `app/src/app/(operator)/app/onboarding/page.tsx`
* `app/src/lib/onboarding.ts`
* `app/src/app/(operator)/app/brand/[id]/page.tsx` (DNA + grid only — not full Hub v2)
* `app/src/test/onboarding.test.ts` — remove wrong DNA insert test; add orchestration regression
* `supabase/functions/brand-intelligence/index.ts` — merge `ai_profile` on UPDATE
* `supabase/migrations/*_ipi46_brand_scores_upsert.sql` — UNIQUE + UPDATE RLS (minimal)

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `createOrgAndBrand` runs **before** edge invoke; brand row has `org_id`
- [ ] Edge invoked with `brandId`; **never** inserts a second brand for onboarding path
- [ ] Edge UPDATE merges form fields (industry, goal, instagram_handle) into `ai_profile`
- [ ] `ai_profile` has flat fields: `tagline`, `category`, `brandVoice`, `contentPillars` (not nested `profile` envelope)
- [ ] `brand_scores` has `visual`, `audience`, `consistency`, `commerce_readiness` on **same** `brand_id`
- [ ] No client-side `dna_readiness` insert
- [ ] Brand Hub DNA badge = AVG of four base scores (not `dna_readiness` row)
- [ ] If analysis fails after shell created, user sees error — brand not treated as complete (no redirect)
- [ ] Regression test: exactly **one** brand row after full onboarding flow (mocked)
- [ ] `cd app && npm test` passes

## Red flags / mitigations

| Risk | Mitigation |
| -- | -- |
| Edge still creates orphan if `brandId` omitted | Onboarding always passes `brandId`; optional: edge returns 422 without `brandId` in follow-up ([IPI-25](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-25/ipi-bi-002-brand-intelligence-gemini-prompt-v2)) |
| Partial failure leaves empty brand | Show error on step 3; do not set onboarding complete |
| Tests mock happy path only | Add `onboarding-orchestration.test.ts` with invoke order assertion |
| Orphan rows in prod | Document cleanup SQL in PR; optional one-off script |

## Verification probes

```bash
rg "createOrgAndBrand" app/src/app/\(operator\)/app/onboarding/page.tsx
rg "dna_readiness" app/src/lib/onboarding.ts          # expect: no insert
rg "brandId" app/src/app/\(operator\)/app/onboarding/page.tsx
cd app && npm test
npm run supabase:verify-rls
```

**Branch:** `ipi/ipi-46-onboarding-orchestration`
**Blocks:** [IPI-26](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-26/ipi-bi-003-brand-intelligence-supabase-schema-v2), [IPI-24](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-24/ipi-bi-001-brand-intelligence-firecrawl-integration), [IPI-25](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-25/ipi-bi-002-brand-intelligence-gemini-prompt-v2), [IPI-29](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-29/ipi-bi-006-brand-intelligence-brand-scoring-v2), [IPI-33](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-33/ipi-bi-010-brand-intelligence-mvp-integration-tests)
**Related:** [IPI-11](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-11/ipi2-176-onboarding-wizard-first-time-user-brand-intake-flow) (regression), [IPI-19](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-19/brand-hub-appbrandid-dynamic-route) (Hub DNA fix partial)

Title: IPI-BI-006 — Brand Intelligence: Brand Scoring v2
Description:
## [IPI-29](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-29/ipi-bi-006-brand-intelligence-brand-scoring-v2) · IPI-BI-006 — Brand Intelligence: Brand Scoring v2

**Team:** iPix1 · **Project:** BRAND · **Epic:** [IPI-20](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-20)  
**Milestone:** BI-M2: Profile + Scoring  
**Linear:** [IPI-29](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-29/ipi-bi-006-brand-intelligence-brand-scoring-v2)

**In plain terms:** Extend scoring from 4 base dimensions to **10**, each with confidence + evidence. The DNA badge stays a **computed average** of the base 4 — never a stored `dna_readiness` row.

**Blocked by:** [IPI-46](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-46) ✅ (DNA AVG fix shipped) · [IPI-26](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-26) (`score_version`, `source`, `details`) · [IPI-25](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-25) (full profile input)

**Unblocks:** [IPI-30](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-30) · [IPI-33](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-33)

**Lifecycle step:** 7 ([`docs/plan/19-brand-lifecycle.md`](<../../plan/19-brand-lifecycle.md>))  
**Status:** `scores_complete` → `ready` (after Hub polish)

**MVP priority:** P0 · **Estimate:** 3 points · **Branch:** `ipi/ipi-29-scoring-v2`

### Skills

`ipix-task-lifecycle` · `gemini` · `mermaid-diagrams`

| Area | Skill guidance |
| -- | -- |
| **Second-pass scoring** | `thinkingLevel: high` + structured JSON per dimension |
| **Evidence** | Store citations in `brand_scores.details.evidence[]` |
| **Hub display** | Reuse `computeDnaScore()` + `scoreColor()` — DNA ≠ sum of 10 |

---

### Score dimensions (10 total)

| # | `score_type` | Source (Epic 1) | Description |
| -- | -- | -- | -- |
| 1 | `visual` | edge fn ([IPI-25](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-25/ipi-bi-002-brand-intelligence-gemini-prompt-v2)) | Visual identity clarity 0–100 |
| 2 | `audience` | edge fn | Audience clarity 0–100 |
| 3 | `consistency` | edge fn | Cross-page consistency 0–100 |
| 4 | `commerce_readiness` | edge fn | E-commerce readiness 0–100 |
| 5 | `brand_clarity` | scoring v2 | Mission / values / UVP clarity |
| 6 | `content_strength` | scoring v2 | Content pillar depth |
| 7 | `social_presence` | scoring v2 | Channels + follower signal |
| 8 | `digital_experience` | scoring v2 | Site UX / mobile / speed signals |
| 9 | `sustainability_signal` | scoring v2 | Eco / ethical indicators |
| 10 | `photography_readiness` | scoring v2 | Product imagery quality |

**DNA badge (UI only):** `AVG(visual, audience, consistency, commerce_readiness)` via `computeDnaScore()` — **not** stored, **not** average of all 10.

**Per-row metadata (**[IPI-26](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-26/ipi-bi-003-brand-intelligence-supabase-schema-v2) **columns + JSONB):**

```json
{
  "confidence": 82,
  "evidence": ["About page states mission clearly", "Instagram bio matches UVP"],
  "source": "edge_fn | mastra_agent",
  "score_version": 1
}
```

---

### What “done” looks like (success criteria)

- [ ] After full analysis: **10 rows** on one `brand_id` (upsert, no duplicates)
- [ ] Each row has `details.confidence` (0–100) and `details.evidence` (string array)
- [ ] `score_version` increments on full re-analysis; `source` set correctly
- [ ] **No** client or edge insert of `dna_readiness` score type
- [ ] Hub DNA badge = `computeDnaScore(base 4)` — matches manual calc
- [ ] Scores grid visible when `scores.length >= 1` (not `> 1`)
- [ ] Legacy `dna_readiness` rows ignored in grid + DNA calc
- [ ] `cd app && npm test` green (`brand-scores.test.ts`, `brand-hub.test.ts`)

---

### Flow — two-pass scoring

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant EF as brand-intelligence
  participant SV2 as score-brand-v2 edge OR Mastra agent
  participant DB as brand_scores
  participant Hub as Brand Hub

  EF->>DB: UPSERT base 4 (IPI-25)
  Note over EF: visual, audience, consistency, commerce_readiness
  SV2->>SV2: Read ai_profile + crawl + social channels
  SV2->>DB: UPSERT extended 6 dimensions
  Note over SV2: details.confidence + evidence per row
  Hub->>DB: SELECT score_type, score, details
  Hub->>Hub: computeDnaScore(base 4 only)
  Hub-->>Hub: Render 10-row grid + DNA badge
```

### Flow — DNA vs stored scores

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  subgraph Stored in brand_scores
    B1[visual]
    B2[audience]
    B3[consistency]
    B4[commerce_readiness]
    E1[brand_clarity]
    E2[content_strength]
    E3[social_presence]
    E4[digital_experience]
    E5[sustainability_signal]
    E6[photography_readiness]
  end
  subgraph Computed UI only
    DNA["DNA badge = AVG(base 4)"]
  end
  B1 --> DNA
  B2 --> DNA
  B3 --> DNA
  B4 --> DNA
  E1 -.->|display only| Grid[Scores grid]
  E2 -.-> Grid
  E3 -.-> Grid
  E4 -.-> Grid
  E5 -.-> Grid
  E6 -.-> Grid
  B1 -.-> Grid
  B2 -.-> Grid
  B3 -.-> Grid
  B4 -.-> Grid
```

---

### Completion steps

#### A. [IPI-46](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-46/ipi-bi-p0-fix-brand-onboarding-orchestration-and-profile-persistence) carry-over (verify — should already be Done)

- [X] **A1** Remove client `dna_readiness` insert — `onboarding.ts`
- [X] **A2** `computeDnaScore()` in `app/src/lib/brand-scores.ts`
- [X] **A3** Hub uses `computeDnaScore(scores)` not `dna_readiness` row
- [ ] **A4** Confirm grid threshold `scores.length >= 1` in `brand/[id]/page.tsx`

#### B. Schema ([IPI-26](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-26/ipi-bi-003-brand-intelligence-supabase-schema-v2) dependency)

- [ ] **B1** Confirm `brand_scores.score_version`, `source` columns on remote
- [ ] **B2** `details` JSONB accepts `{ confidence, evidence }` without migration change
- [ ] **B3** UNIQUE `(brand_id, score_type)` — from [IPI-126](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-126/ipi-bi-ops-002-push-ipi-46-migration-verify-remote) (required for upsert)

#### C. Scoring v2 implementation

- [ ] **C1** Add edge fn `score-brand-v2` **or** extend `brand-intelligence` second pass (pick one; document)
- [ ] **C2** Gemini schema: 6 extended dimensions + confidence + evidence per field
- [ ] **C3** Upsert all 10 types; set `source: 'edge_fn'` or `'mastra_agent'`
- [ ] **C4** Bump `score_version` on full re-run (read max + 1)
- [ ] **C5** Wire into workflow after [IPI-25](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-25/ipi-bi-002-brand-intelligence-gemini-prompt-v2) profile write ([IPI-32](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-32/ipi-bi-009-brand-intelligence-mastra-workflow) / [IPI-132](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-132/aior-003-brand-intake-workflow-suspendresume))

#### D. Hub UI (minimal — full tabs in [IPI-30](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-30/ipi-bi-007-brand-hub-v2-full-profile-ui))

- [ ] **D1** Scores grid lists all 10 types with `scoreLabel()` + `scoreColor()`
- [ ] **D2** Show confidence chip when `details.confidence` present
- [ ] **D3** Tooltip or expand for `details.evidence[]` (1–3 bullets)
- [ ] **D4** Filter out `dna_readiness` from grid if legacy rows exist

#### E. Tests + verify

- [ ] **E1** `brand-scores.test.ts` — 10-type upsert mock; DNA still base-4 AVG
- [ ] **E2** `brand-hub.test.ts` — grid renders with 1 score; legacy `dna_readiness` ignored
- [ ] **E3** `npm run supabase:verify-rls` — UPDATE path on `brand_scores`
- [ ] **E4** Manual smoke: onboarding → Hub shows DNA + ≥4 scores (10 when v2 live)

---

### Verifier probes

```bash
rg "dna_readiness" app/src --glob '!**/*.test.*'     # expect: 0 inserts
rg "computeDnaScore|BASE_SCORE_TYPES" app/src
rg "brand_clarity|photography_readiness" supabase/functions
cd app && npm test -- src/test/brand-scores.test.ts src/test/brand-hub.test.ts
npm run supabase:verify-rls
```

---

### Gantt

```mermaid
gantt
    title IPI-29 · Scoring v2
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Verify P0 fix
    Confirm IPI-46 DNA path       :done, c0, 2026-06-25, 1d
    section Build
    score-brand-v2 edge + schema  :c1, 2026-07-18, 3d
    Hub grid + confidence UI      :c2, after c1, 2d
    section Verify
    Tests + manual smoke          :crit, c3, after c2, 1d
    Done                          :milestone, cdone, after c3, 0d
```

---

### Risks & mitigations

| Risk | Mitigation |
| -- | -- |
| DNA confused with 10-dim average | Document + test: `BASE_SCORE_TYPES` only in `computeDnaScore` |
| Token cost of 10-dim pass | Batch in one structured call or Mastra agent step |
| Legacy `dna_readiness` rows in prod | Filter in UI; optional cleanup SQL in PR |

Title: IPI-BI-003 — Brand Intelligence: Supabase Schema v2
Description:
## IPI-26 · IPI-BI-003 — Brand Intelligence: Supabase Schema v2

**In plain terms:** **Engineer** adds Epic 1 tables/columns so Firecrawl, social discovery, scoring v2, progress UX, and Mastra workflow can persist data — after IPI-46 + IPI-126 are on remote.

**Dependencies:** [IPI-46](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-46) **Done** · [IPI-126](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-126) **Done**

**Unblocks:** IPI-24 → IPI-25 → IPI-29; also IPI-27, IPI-28, IPI-31, IPI-32, IPI-33

**MVP priority:** **P0** · **Estimate:** 5 · **Branch:** `ipi/ipi-26-schema-v2`

**Skills:** `ipix-supabase` · `task-verifier` · `create-migration` · `create-rls-policies`

**Team:** iPix1 · BRAND · Milestone **BI-M1: Schema + Firecrawl**

**SQL SSOT:** [`docs/plan/17-brand-intelligence-plan.md`](<../../plan/17-brand-intelligence-plan.md>) §7 (adapt column names below)  
**Lifecycle SSOT:** [`docs/plan/19-brand-lifecycle.md`](<../../plan/19-brand-lifecycle.md>) — `brands.intake_status` uses **7-state enum** (this issue); HITL approval uses `brand_intake_drafts.status`, not `brands.intake_status`

---

## Diagrams

### Epic 1 dependency chain

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    IPI46["IPI-46 Onboarding P0 ✅"] --> IPI126["IPI-126 Score upsert RLS ✅"]
    IPI126 --> IPI26["IPI-26 Schema v2 — this issue"]
    IPI26 --> IPI24["IPI-24 Firecrawl"]
    IPI24 --> IPI25["IPI-25 Gemini v2"]
    IPI25 --> IPI29["IPI-29 Scoring v2"]
    IPI26 --> IPI27["IPI-27 Social Discovery"]
    IPI24 --> IPI28["IPI-28 Visual Identity"]
    IPI24 --> IPI31["IPI-31 Progress UX"]
    IPI24 --> IPI32["IPI-32 Mastra workflow"]
    IPI25 --> IPI30["IPI-30 Brand Hub v2"]
```

### Schema v2 ERD (IPI-26 scope)

```mermaid
erDiagram
    brands ||--o{ brand_scores : scores
    brands ||--o{ brand_social_channels : channels
    brands ||--o{ brand_competitors : competitors
    brands ||--o{ brand_crawl_results : crawls
    brands ||--o{ brand_agent_results : agent_runs
    brands ||--o{ brand_intake_drafts : hitl_drafts

    brands {
        uuid id PK
        uuid org_id FK
        enum intake_status
        text instagram_handle
        jsonb ai_profile
    }

    brand_scores {
        uuid id PK
        uuid brand_id FK
        text score_type
        int score_version
        text source
        jsonb details
    }

    brand_social_channels {
        uuid id PK
        uuid brand_id FK
        text platform
        text handle
        text url
    }

    brand_competitors {
        uuid id PK
        uuid brand_id FK
        text name
        jsonb profile_jsonb
    }

    brand_crawl_results {
        uuid id PK
        uuid brand_id FK
        text firecrawl_job_id UK
        text status
        timestamptz started_at
        timestamptz completed_at
        jsonb raw_data
    }

    brand_agent_results {
        uuid id PK
        uuid brand_id FK
        text agent_name
        text agent_version
        text model
        text run_id
        text status
        timestamptz started_at
        timestamptz completed_at
        jsonb output
    }

    brand_intake_drafts {
        uuid id PK
        uuid brand_id FK
        uuid user_id FK
        text status
        jsonb draft_profile
        jsonb draft_scores
    }
```

*HITL* `draft_pending_approval` *lives on* `brand_intake_drafts.status`*, not* `brands.intake_status`*.*

### `brand_intake_status` state machine (on `brands`)

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> brand_created: createOrgAndBrand
    brand_created --> crawl_running: startCrawl IPI-24
    brand_created --> analysis_running: urlContext v1 skip crawl
    crawl_running --> crawl_complete: Firecrawl webhook
    crawl_running --> failed: crawl error
    crawl_complete --> analysis_running: brand-intelligence IPI-25
    analysis_running --> scores_complete: scoreBrand IPI-29
    analysis_running --> failed: gemini error
    scores_complete --> ready: hub valid IPI-30
    ready --> analysis_running: explicit re-analyze
    failed --> crawl_running: retry crawl
    failed --> analysis_running: retry analysis
```

### Implementation + verification flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph Migrations
        A1["A1 Enum + backfill brands"]
        A2["A2 brand_scores audit cols"]
        A3["A3 Four new tables + indexes"]
        A4["A4 Alter brand_intake_drafts RLS"]
        A1 --> A2 --> A3 --> A4
    end

    A4 --> P["npm run supabase:push"]
    P --> T["npm run supabase:types"]
    T --> R["Extend verify-rls.mjs"]
    R --> V["verify + verify-rls green"]
    V --> RT["ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime"]
    RT --> RTV["pg_publication_tables check"]
    RTV --> B["cd app && npm run build"]
    B --> Done["Linear Done"]
```

### Realtime path (IPI-31 consumes this)

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Edge as start-brand-crawl
    participant DB as brand_crawl_results
    participant Pub as supabase_realtime
    participant Hub as Brand Hub IPI-31

    Edge->>DB: INSERT status=queued
    Note over DB,Pub: IPI-26 adds table to publication
    DB-->>Pub: postgres_changes
    Pub-->>Hub: crawl progress stream
    Edge->>DB: UPDATE status=running pages_crawled
    Edge->>DB: UPDATE status=complete raw_data
```

### Build timeline

```mermaid
gantt
    title IPI-26 Schema v2
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Migrations
    Enum brands instagram_handle     :a1, 2026-06-25, 1d
    New tables indexes RLS           :a2, after a1, 2d
    Alter brand_intake_drafts          :a3, after a1, 1d
    section Verify
    types + verify-rls extension     :crit, b1, after a2, 1d
    Realtime publication + build     :b2, after b1, 1d
    Done milestone                   :milestone, mdone, after b2, 0d
```

---

### Remote baseline (2026-06-25)

| Object | Status |
| -- | -- |
| `brands.intake_status` | CHECK `none \| draft \| approved` — **replace with enum** |
| `brands.instagram_handle` | missing |
| `brand_scores` | has `details`; missing `score_version`, `source` |
| `brand_intake_drafts` | **exists** (14 cols) — **alter** RLS/org only |
| `brand_social_channels` | missing |
| `brand_competitors` | missing |
| `brand_crawl_results` | missing |
| `brand_agent_results` | missing |

**Skip (IPI-126):** `UNIQUE(brand_id, score_type)` + `brand_scores` UPDATE RLS.

---

### 1. `brands.intake_status` — lifecycle enum (blocker)

Replace text CHECK with Postgres enum `brand_intake_status`:

```sql
CREATE TYPE public.brand_intake_status AS ENUM (
  'brand_created',
  'crawl_running',
  'crawl_complete',
  'analysis_running',
  'scores_complete',
  'ready',
  'failed'
);
```

**Do not use** legacy `none`, `draft`, `approved`, or ambiguous `pending` / `complete` / `draft_pending_approval` on `brands`.

**Backfill:**

| Old | New |
| -- | -- |
| `none` | `brand_created` |
| `draft` | `brand_created` |
| `approved` | `ready` |
| NULL / empty | `brand_created` |

**HITL:** `draft_pending_approval` → `brand_intake_drafts.status` (IPI-132 / IPI-111), not `brands.intake_status`.

**Also add:** `brands.instagram_handle text` + partial index (plan §7.1).

---

### 2. `brand_scores` — audit columns

`details` **already exists** — do not re-add.

```sql
ALTER TABLE public.brand_scores
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS score_version int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'edge_fn'
    CHECK (source IN ('edge_fn', 'mastra_agent', 'manual', 'benchmarked', 'firecrawl'));
```

---

### 3. New tables + indexes

| Table | Required indexes / constraints |
| -- | -- |
| `brand_social_channels` | `UNIQUE (brand_id, platform)` · `idx` on `brand_id` |
| `brand_competitors` | `idx_brand_competitors_brand` on `(brand_id)` |
| `brand_crawl_results` | `idx_brand_crawl_results_brand` on `(brand_id)` · `UNIQUE (firecrawl_job_id)` · columns: `status` (not `crawl_status`), `started_at`, `completed_at`, `pages_crawled`, `raw_data` |
| `brand_agent_results` | `idx` on `(brand_id)` · `idx` on `(agent_name)` · columns: `agent_name`, `agent_version`, `model`, `run_id`, `status`, `started_at`, `completed_at`, `output`, `tokens_in`, `tokens_out`, `duration_ms` |

**Deferred:** `brand_personas`, `brands.embedding`.

**RLS:** `is_org_member(b.org_id)` for SELECT; service-role for INSERT/UPDATE on agent/crawl writes.

---

### 4. `brand_intake_drafts` — alter only

Table exists on remote. **Do not CREATE.**

- [ ] RLS aligned to org ownership (`is_org_member` via `brands.org_id`)
- [ ] HITL validation constraints on `status` if missing
- [ ] Extend `verify-rls.mjs` cross-user deny on SELECT

No new table migration unless a column gap is found during implementation.

---

### 5. Realtime (explicit — table alone is insufficient)

After `brand_crawl_results` exists:

```sql
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE public.brand_crawl_results;
```

**Verify:**

```sql
SELECT schemaname, tablename FROM pg_publication_tables
WHERE pubname = 'supabase_realtime' AND tablename = 'brand_crawl_results';
```

---

### 6. `verify-rls.mjs` — must cover new surface

Extending the script is **required** — `verify-rls` green without new probes is not acceptance.

| Table | Probe |
| -- | -- |
| `brand_social_channels` | org-member SELECT · cross-user deny |
| `brand_competitors` | org-member SELECT · cross-user deny |
| `brand_crawl_results` | org-member SELECT · cross-user deny |
| `brand_agent_results` | org-member SELECT · cross-user deny |
| `brand_intake_drafts` | owner/org SELECT · cross-user deny |

---

### Completion steps

#### A. Migrations

- [ ] **A1** Enum migration + backfill + `instagram_handle`
- [ ] **A2** `brand_scores` `score_version` / `source`
- [ ] **A3** Four new tables + indexes (plan §7.2–7.6, columns above)
- [ ] **A4** `brand_intake_drafts` RLS alter only
- [ ] **A5** `npm run supabase:push` · migrations listed on remote

#### B. Types + verify

- [ ] **B1** `npm run supabase:types` committed
- [ ] **B2** `verify-rls.mjs` extended (§6)
- [ ] **B3** `npm run supabase:verify` + `supabase:verify-rls` green

#### C. Realtime

- [ ] **C1** Publication added + SQL verification (§5)

#### D. Ship

- [ ] **D1** `cd app && npm run build`
- [ ] **D2** PR cites lifecycle steps enabled · schema-only (no Firecrawl code)
- [ ] **D3** Linear **Done**

---

### Verifier probes

| Probe | Pass |
| -- | -- |
| Enum `brand_intake_status` | 7 values; no `none/draft/approved` |
| Backfill | all `brands` rows valid enum |
| `instagram_handle` column | exists |
| `score_version` + `source` | on `brand_scores`; `details` unchanged |
| 4 new tables | on remote with indexes |
| `brand_intake_drafts` | alter only; RLS probes pass |
| `verify-rls.mjs` | all 5 tables in §6 probed |
| Realtime | `pg_publication_tables` row |
| Score upsert baseline | 4 rows per brand (IPI-126) |

---

Title: IPI-BI-002 — Brand Intelligence: Gemini Prompt v2
Description:
## IPI-25 · IPI-BI-002 — Brand Intelligence: Gemini Prompt v2

**Team:** iPix1 · **Project:** BRAND · **Epic:** [IPI-20](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-20)  
**Milestone:** BI-M2: Profile + Scoring  
**Linear:** [IPI-25](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-25/ipi-bi-002-brand-intelligence-gemini-prompt-v2)

**In plain terms:** Gemini reads the **saved Firecrawl crawl** (not just a URL) and writes a rich brand profile (~20 JSON fields) plus 4 base scores onto the **same** `brand_id` from onboarding. No duplicate brands, no nested `profile` envelope.

**Blocked by:** [IPI-46](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-46) ✅ · [IPI-24](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-24) (crawl in `brand_crawl_results`)

**Unblocks:** [IPI-29](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-29) · [IPI-30](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-30) · [IPI-32](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-32)

**Lifecycle steps:** 5 → 6 ([`docs/plan/19-brand-lifecycle.md`](<../../plan/19-brand-lifecycle.md>))  
**Status transitions:** `crawl_complete` → `analysis_running` → `scores_complete` (base 4)

**MVP priority:** P0 · **Estimate:** 5 points · **Branch:** `ipi/ipi-25-gemini-v2`

### Skills

`ipix-task-lifecycle` · `gemini` · `mermaid-diagrams`

| Gemini pattern | Use in IPI-25 |
| -- | -- |
| **Structured output** | `responseMimeType: application/json` + `responseSchema` (Type enums) |
| **URL Context** | Fallback when crawl thin; verify `urlRetrievalStatus` |
| **Google Search** | Ground category/competitor claims; log `groundingMetadata` |
| **thinkingLevel: high** | Full profile extraction from large crawl payload |
| `_shared/gemini.ts` | Centralize model + logging (target; migrate from inline) |

**Model target:** `gemini-3.5-flash` via `_shared/gemini.ts` (`resolveGeminiModel()`)

---

### Field manifest (Epic 1 MVP)

**Core profile (11)** — flat on `brands.ai_profile`:

`name`, `tagline`, `category`, `visualIdentity`, `targetAudience`, `sourceUrl`, `contentPillars`, `brandVoice`, `recommendedServices`, `productionReadiness`, `analyzedAt`

**v2 extensions (9):**

`mission`, `vision`, `values[]`, `uvp`, `positioning`, `brandPersonality`, `confidenceScore`, `evidenceSources[]`, `competitorSignals[]`

**Scores (4 rows in** `brand_scores`**)** — not inside `ai_profile`:

`visual`, `audience`, `consistency`, `commerce_readiness`

**Total:** 20 profile JSON fields + 4 score dimensions (agent-only fields deferred to Epic 2+)

---

### What “done” looks like (success criteria)

- [ ] POST body **requires** `brandId` — 422 if missing (onboarding path never orphans)
- [ ] Optional `crawlResultId` loads `brand_crawl_results.raw_data` as primary context
- [ ] Without crawl: degrade to URL Context + Search (v1 path) for dev/preview only
- [ ] UPDATE merges `{ ...existing.ai_profile, ...extracted }` — keeps `industry`, `goal`, `instagram_handle` from IPI-46 shell
- [ ] Response + DB use **flat** fields (`profile.tagline` in API, not `profile.profile.tagline`)
- [ ] Upsert 4 scores on same `brand_id` with `onConflict: brand_id,score_type`
- [ ] `ai_agent_logs` row per run (tokens, model, duration)
- [ ] `cd app && npm test` + `npm run supabase:verify-brand-intelligence` green

---

### Flow — analysis with crawl input

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant WF as Workflow / onboarding
  participant EF as brand-intelligence edge
  participant DB as Postgres
  participant G as Gemini 3.5 Flash

  WF->>EF: POST { brandId, crawlResultId?, url, brand_name }
  EF->>DB: SELECT brand + crawl raw_data
  EF->>EF: Build prompt (crawl markdown + form metadata)
  EF->>G: generateContent + responseSchema + tools
  G-->>EF: JSON profile + 4 scores
  EF->>DB: UPDATE brands.ai_profile (merge)
  EF->>DB: UPSERT brand_scores ×4
  EF->>DB: intake_status → scores_complete
  EF-->>WF: { brandId, profile, scores }
```

### Flow — Gemini tool + schema config

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  subgraph Input
    CRAWL[raw_data pages]
    FORM[shell ai_profile]
    URL[brand_url fallback]
  end
  subgraph Gemini
    P[Prompt + few-shot examples]
    T[urlContext + googleSearch]
    S[responseSchema 20 fields]
    TH[thinkingLevel high]
  end
  subgraph Output
    PROF[merged ai_profile]
    SC[4 score rows]
  end
  CRAWL --> P
  FORM --> P
  URL --> T
  P --> S
  T --> S
  S --> PROF
  S --> SC
```

---

### Completion steps

#### A. Shared Gemini client (`gemini` skill)

- [ ] **A1** Create `supabase/functions/_shared/gemini.ts` — `DEFAULT_MODEL`, `generateStructured()`, error wrap
- [ ] **A2** Move schema to `supabase/functions/_shared/schemas/brand-profile.ts` (Type enums)
- [ ] **A3** Log via existing `_shared/agent-log.ts` (model, tokens, `brand_id`)

#### B. Edge function hardening

- [ ] **B1** Require `brandId` — return 422 when absent (remove silent INSERT for onboarding)
- [ ] **B2** Load crawl: `crawlResultId` → `brand_crawl_results.raw_data`; validate `brand_id` match
- [ ] **B3** Prompt v2: paragraph-style instructions + 2–3 few-shot examples (`gemini` prompting ref)
- [ ] **B4** Merge on UPDATE (keep IPI-46 pattern); set `_lifecycle: scores_complete`
- [ ] **B5** Truncate crawl payload if token budget exceeded (summarize pages server-side)
- [ ] **B6** Parse + validate required schema fields before DB write

#### C. Operator / workflow contract

- [ ] **C1** `invokeBrandIntelligence` accepts optional `crawlResultId` after IPI-24
- [ ] **C2** On analysis failure: error UI, `intake_status=failed`, no Hub redirect
- [ ] **C3** Document request/response shape in `docs/brand-intelligence/`

#### D. Tests

- [ ] **D1** Edge unit tests: merge preserves `industry`/`goal`; rejects missing `brandId`
- [ ] **D2** Fixture: `app/src/test/fixtures/firecrawl-sample-raw_data.json` → schema extraction mock
- [ ] **D3** Extend `onboarding-orchestration.test.ts` if crawl step added
- [ ] **D4** `npm run supabase:verify-brand-intelligence`

#### E. Verify + ship

- [ ] **E1** `infisical run -- npm run supabase:verify-edge`
- [ ] **E2** Manual: brand with crawl → Hub shows `tagline`, category, 4 scores
- [ ] **E3** Re-analyze same brand → no duplicate score rows (upsert)
- [ ] **E4** Linear **Done** · PR links IPI-25 + lifecycle steps 5–6

---

### Verifier probes

```bash
rg "crawlResultId|raw_data" supabase/functions/brand-intelligence
rg "responseSchema|responseMimeType" supabase/functions/brand-intelligence
rg "brandId" supabase/functions/brand-intelligence/index.ts
rg "dna_readiness" app/src/lib/onboarding.ts          # expect: no insert
cd app && npm test
npm run supabase:verify-brand-intelligence
```

---

### Gantt

```mermaid
gantt
    title IPI-25 · Gemini prompt v2
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Foundation
    _shared/gemini.ts + schema      :b1, 2026-07-14, 2d
    section Edge
    crawl input + merge + 422       :b2, after b1, 3d
    Prompt v2 + few-shot            :b3, after b2, 2d
    section Verify
    Tests + brand-intelligence verify :crit, b4, after b3, 2d

```

---

### Out of scope (defer)

* Firecrawl crawl itself → IPI-24
* 6 extra score dimensions → IPI-29
* Mastra `brand-scoring-v2` agent → Epic 2 / IPI-132 workflow
* Full Hub tabs → IPI-30

Title: IPI-BI-001 — Brand Intelligence: Firecrawl Integration
Description:
## IPI-24 · IPI-BI-001 — Brand Intelligence: Firecrawl Integration

**Team:** iPix1 · **Project:** BRAND · **Epic:** [IPI-20](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-20)  
**Milestone:** BI-M1: Schema + Firecrawl  
**Linear:** [IPI-24](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-24/ipi-bi-001-brand-intelligence-firecrawl-integration)

**In plain terms:** After onboarding creates one org-linked brand, Firecrawl v2 crawls the brand website (≤50 pages), saves **job history + per-page markdown/JSON** in Postgres, and the operator sees crawl progress in real time. Gemini (IPI-25) reads the crawl job — not URL guesses alone.

**Blocked by:** [IPI-46](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-46) ✅ · [IPI-26](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-26) (base tables + Realtime)

**Unblocks:** [IPI-25](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-25) · [IPI-27](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-27) · [IPI-28](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-28) · [IPI-31](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-31) · [IPI-32](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-32)

**Lifecycle steps:** 3 → 4 ([`docs/plan/19-brand-lifecycle.md`](<../../plan/19-brand-lifecycle.md>))  
**Brand** `intake_status`**:** `brand_created` → `crawl_running` → `crawl_complete` | `failed` *(unchanged — MVP)*

**MVP priority:** P0 · **Estimate:** 5 points · **Branch:** `ipi/ipi-24-firecrawl`

### Skills

`ipix-task-lifecycle` · `firecrawl-build-onboarding` · `firecrawl-build-interact` · `firecrawl-build-search` · `mermaid-diagrams`

| Skill | When to use in this task |
| -- | -- |
| **firecrawl-build-onboarding** | `FIRECRAWL_API_KEY` + `FIRECRAWL_WEBHOOK_SECRET` via Infisical; edge-only |
| **firecrawl-build-interact** | Escalate subset of pages when `/crawl` misses JS-only content |
| **firecrawl-build-search** | Optional competitor URL discovery (IPI-28 — out of MVP scope) |

### Official Firecrawl alignment (v2)

| Topic | Official reference | iPix rule |
| -- | -- | -- |
| Start crawl | `POST https://api.firecrawl.dev/v2/crawl` | [`crawl-post`](<https://docs.firecrawl.dev/api-reference/endpoint/crawl-post>) |
| Webhook events | `crawl.started`, `crawl.page`, `crawl.completed` | [`webhooks/events`](<https://docs.firecrawl.dev/webhooks/events>) |
| Signature | `X-Firecrawl-Signature: sha256=…` HMAC raw body | [`webhooks/security`](<https://docs.firecrawl.dev/webhooks/security>) |
| Retries | 3 retries (1m, 5m, 15m); respond **2xx within 10s** | [`webhooks/overview`](<https://docs.firecrawl.dev/webhooks/overview>) |
| Page metadata | `title`, `description`, `statusCode`, `url`, `scrapeId` in `data[].metadata` | `crawl.page` payload |
| Formats | `formats: ['markdown']` on crawl/scrape | No client SDK in browser |

---

### What “done” looks like (success criteria) — MVP unchanged

- [ ] Operator submits onboarding → crawl starts on the **existing** `brand_id` (no new brand row)
- [ ] `brand_crawls` job row: metrics, audit fields, `firecrawl_job_id` UNIQUE, idempotent start
- [ ] `brand_crawl_results` **per-page** rows with metadata + `markdown` + `raw_json`
- [ ] **Backward compat:** `brand_crawls.raw_data` denormalized aggregate (same shape IPI-25 reads today)
- [ ] Webhook verifies HMAC; upserts by `firecrawl_job_id` + event idempotency
- [ ] `brands.intake_status` → `crawl_running` → `crawl_complete`
- [ ] Realtime on `brand_crawls` (job progress) — IPI-31 subscribes
- [ ] All Firecrawl HTTP via `_shared/firecrawl.ts` only
- [ ] `npm run supabase:verify-brand-intelligence` + `verify-rls` green

---

### Data model — job history + page results

```mermaid
erDiagram
    brands ||--o{ brand_crawls : "crawl history"
    brand_crawls ||--o{ brand_crawl_results : pages

    brands {
        uuid id PK
        text intake_status
    }

    brand_crawls {
        uuid id PK
        uuid brand_id FK
        text firecrawl_job_id UK
        text source_url
        text job_status
        text pipeline_state
        int pages_found
        int pages_crawled
        int pages_failed
        int retry_count
        text idempotency_key
        uuid started_by FK
        text workflow_id
        text request_id
        int duration_ms
        jsonb raw_payload
        jsonb raw_data
        timestamptz started_at
        timestamptz completed_at
    }

    brand_crawl_results {
        uuid id PK
        uuid crawl_id FK
        text page_url
        text title
        text description
        int status_code
        int word_count
        int page_depth
        text markdown
        jsonb raw_json
        text firecrawl_scrape_id
    }
```

**Why two tables (no MVP scope creep):**

| Table | Role | MVP writes |
| -- | -- | -- |
| `brand_crawls` | One row per crawl **attempt** (history, metrics, audit) | `start-brand-crawl`, webhook job events |
| `brand_crawl_results` | One row per **page** (`crawl.page` events) | `firecrawl-webhook` only |

**Backward compatibility (IPI-25):**

* `crawlResultId` continues to mean `brand_crawls.id` (job id).
* `brand_crawls.raw_data` = denormalized `{ pages: [{ markdown, metadata }] }` rebuilt on each `crawl.page` and finalized on `crawl.completed` — same JSON shape as pre-split design.
* IPI-25 may later read normalized pages via `crawl_id` join; not required for IPI-24 MVP.

**Future-ready** `pipeline_state` (enum exists; only `crawl_only` set in IPI-24):

`crawl_only` → `pending_analysis` → `analysis_running` → `analysis_complete` → `scoring_running` → `scoring_complete` | `pipeline_failed`  
*(IPI-25 / IPI-29 write later states — no extra edge work in IPI-24)*

---

### Flow — async crawl pipeline (v2 webhooks)

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant Op as Operator
  participant UI as /app/onboarding
  participant Start as start-brand-crawl
  participant FC as Firecrawl v2
  participant WH as firecrawl-webhook
  participant Job as brand_crawls
  participant Page as brand_crawl_results
  participant RT as Realtime

  Op->>UI: Finish step 2 (brand shell exists)
  UI->>Start: POST { brandId, url, idempotencyKey? }
  Start->>Job: INSERT job_status=queued, audit fields
  Start->>FC: POST /v2/crawl + webhook metadata
  FC-->>Start: { id: firecrawl_job_id }
  Start->>Job: UPDATE firecrawl_job_id, job_status=running
  Start->>Job: brands.intake_status=crawl_running

  FC-->>WH: crawl.started (signed)
  WH->>Job: idempotent UPDATE (metrics)

  loop each page
    FC-->>WH: crawl.page (signed)
    WH->>Page: UPSERT page row (metadata, markdown, raw_json)
    WH->>Job: increment pages_crawled, rebuild raw_data
    Job-->>RT: postgres_changes
  end

  FC-->>WH: crawl.completed (signed)
  WH->>Job: job_status=complete, duration_ms, raw_payload
  WH->>Job: brands.intake_status=crawl_complete, pipeline_state=crawl_only
```

### Idempotency & retries

| Layer | Key | Behavior |
| -- | -- | -- |
| **Start crawl** | `(brand_id, idempotency_key)` UNIQUE partial | Same key within 24h → return existing `brand_crawls.id` if not `failed` |
| **Firecrawl job** | `firecrawl_job_id` UNIQUE | One job row per Firecrawl `id` |
| **Webhook event** | `(firecrawl_job_id, event_type, scrape_id?)` | `crawl.page` upsert by `(crawl_id, firecrawl_scrape_id)`; ignore duplicate deliveries |
| **Firecrawl retry** | Their 3× webhook retry | We always `200` within 10s; `retry_count` on job tracks **our** re-start attempts only |
| **Page row** | `UNIQUE (crawl_id, page_url)` | Last write wins on replay |

Pass `webhook.metadata` from start: `{ brand_id, crawl_id, request_id, workflow_id }` per [Firecrawl webhook config](<https://docs.firecrawl.dev/webhooks/overview>).

---

### SQL plan (additive migration on IPI-26)

**File:** `supabase/migrations/20260627000000_brand_crawls_job_pages.sql`  
**Policy:** Additive only — does not drop IPI-26 objects. Repurpose `brand_crawl_results` from job-blob to page rows via new `brand_crawls` parent.

```sql
-- Enums (job = Firecrawl mirror; pipeline = Gemini/scoring — future states)
DO $$ BEGIN
  CREATE TYPE public.brand_crawl_job_status AS ENUM (
    'queued', 'running', 'complete', 'failed', 'cancelled'
  );
EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN NULL; END $$;

DO $$ BEGIN
  CREATE TYPE public.brand_crawl_pipeline_state AS ENUM (
    'crawl_only',
    'pending_analysis',
    'analysis_running',
    'analysis_complete',
    'scoring_running',
    'scoring_complete',
    'pipeline_failed'
  );
EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN NULL; END $$;

-- 1) Job / history table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.brand_crawls (
  id                  uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  brand_id            uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES public.brands(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  firecrawl_job_id    text UNIQUE,
  source_url          text NOT NULL,
  job_status          public.brand_crawl_job_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued',
  pipeline_state      public.brand_crawl_pipeline_state DEFAULT 'crawl_only',
  pages_found         int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  pages_crawled       int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  pages_failed        int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  retry_count         int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  idempotency_key     text,
  started_by          uuid REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  workflow_id         text,
  request_id          text,
  duration_ms         int,
  raw_payload         jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',  -- full Firecrawl job / completed snapshot
  raw_data            jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',  -- legacy aggregate for IPI-25
  started_at          timestamptz,
  completed_at        timestamptz,
  created_at          timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at          timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS brand_crawls_brand_id_idx
  ON public.brand_crawls (brand_id, created_at DESC);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS brand_crawls_idempotency_active_uidx
  ON public.brand_crawls (brand_id, idempotency_key)
  WHERE idempotency_key IS NOT NULL AND job_status NOT IN ('failed', 'cancelled');

-- 2) Evolve brand_crawl_results → per-page (IPI-26 table may exist as job blob)
ALTER TABLE public.brand_crawl_results
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS crawl_id uuid REFERENCES public.brand_crawls(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS page_url text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS title text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status_code int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS word_count int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS page_depth int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS markdown text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS raw_json jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS firecrawl_scrape_id text;

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS brand_crawl_results_crawl_page_uidx
  ON public.brand_crawl_results (crawl_id, page_url)
  WHERE crawl_id IS NOT NULL AND page_url IS NOT NULL;
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS brand_crawl_results_crawl_scrape_uidx
  ON public.brand_crawl_results (crawl_id, firecrawl_scrape_id)
  WHERE crawl_id IS NOT NULL AND firecrawl_scrape_id IS NOT NULL;

-- 3) RLS (org-member SELECT; edge service_role writes)
ALTER TABLE public.brand_crawls ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "brand_crawls_select_org_member"
  ON public.brand_crawls FOR SELECT TO authenticated
  USING (EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM public.brands b
    WHERE b.id = brand_crawls.brand_id AND public.is_org_member(b.org_id)
  ));

-- Extend existing brand_crawl_results SELECT policy scope (page rows via crawl join)
-- Realtime: ADD brand_crawls to publication (keep brand_crawl_results optional)
-- ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE public.brand_crawls;
```

**Migration note:** If IPI-26 shipped job-level rows in `brand_crawl_results`, run one-time backfill: insert `brand_crawls` from legacy rows, set `crawl_id`, split `raw_data.pages[]` into page rows. New code path only after backfill.

---

### `_shared/firecrawl.ts` (single HTTP gateway)

All edge functions import from here — **no** `@mendable/firecrawl-js`, **no** client bundle.

```typescript
// supabase/functions/_shared/firecrawl.ts — contract (implement in IPI-24)

const FIRECRAWL_BASE = "https://api.firecrawl.dev/v2";

export type FirecrawlCrawlStart = {
  url: string;
  limit?: number;                    // default 50 (MVP cap)
  maxDiscoveryDepth?: number;
  formats?: ("markdown")[];
  webhook: {
    url: string;
    metadata: Record<string, string>;
    events?: ("started" | "page" | "completed" | "failed")[];
  };
};

export async function firecrawlStartCrawl(body: FirecrawlCrawlStart): Promise<{ id: string }>;
export async function firecrawlScrape(url: string): Promise<unknown>;  // escalation / smoke
export function verifyFirecrawlSignature(rawBody: string, header: string | null): boolean;
export function parseCrawlPageEvent(event: unknown): {
  jobId: string;
  type: string;
  pages: Array<{
    markdown?: string;
    metadata: {
      title?: string;
      description?: string;
      statusCode?: number;
      url?: string;
      sourceURL?: string;
      scrapeId?: string;
    };
  }>;
};
export function wordCountFromMarkdown(md: string): number;
```

**Production practices:**

* `Authorization: Bearer ${FIRECRAWL_API_KEY}` from `getOptionalSecret`
* Webhook handler: read **raw body** before JSON parse for HMAC ([security doc](<https://docs.firecrawl.dev/webhooks/security>))
* Return `200` + `"ok"` within 10s; defer heavy DB work via `EdgeRuntime.waitUntil` if needed
* Log `request_id` + `workflow_id` to `ai_agent_logs` on failure

### Risks & mitigations

| Risk | Mitigation |
| -- | -- |
| IPI-26 job-blob rows exist | One-time backfill migration; dual `raw_data` on `brand_crawls` |
| Webhook timeout (>10s) | Ack fast; `waitUntil` for DB; idempotent upserts |
| Firecrawl 3× retry storms | Unique page keys; monotonic `pages_crawled` |
| Large markdown | Cap 50 pages; `word_count` for observability only |
| IPI-25 reads old shape | Keep `brand_crawls.raw_data` aggregate |

*Refs: [Firecrawl v2 crawl](<https://docs.firecrawl.dev/api-reference/endpoint/crawl-post>) · [Webhook events](<https://docs.firecrawl.dev/webhooks/events>) · [Webhook security](<https://docs.firecrawl.dev/webhooks/security>)*

Title: DESIGN-050 · Command Center — React Parity Workspace
Description:
# IPI-17 · DESIGN-050 — Command Center React Parity Workspace

**Linear:** [IPI-17](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-17)  
**Parent:** [IPI-254](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-254) · DESIGN V2  
**Priority:** Urgent · P0 #1 in [`tasks/plan/todo.md`](<../../tasks/plan/todo.md>)  
**Wireframe:** [`tasks/wireframes-ipix/IPI-17-DESIGN-050-command-center.wire`](<../../tasks/wireframes-ipix/IPI-17-DESIGN-050-command-center.wire>)  
**Status:** Done · merged [#168 ](<https://github.com/amo-tech-ai/lumina-studio/pull/168>)`9eba76f` · 2026-07-01

---

## Plain English

After this ships, operators land on `/app` and see a **portfolio-first dashboard** — live system status, brand hero, recent work, pending approvals, and one-click next actions — inside the **3-panel OperatorShell**, not a link grid.

**Blocked by:** nothing hard · **Unblocks:** operator first impression · KPI routing · AI context on every session

---

## The problem this solves

* Today `/app` is a **card router** (~15% DC) with placeholder status strings — not the main dashboard from [`Command Center.v2.image-first.dc.html`](<../../Universal%20design%20prompt/Command%20Center.v2.image-first.dc.html>).
* No **OperatorShell** — page is standalone; IntelligencePanel / NavSidebar not wired on home.
* No **Supabase KPI reads** — counts are fake; approvals strip missing.
* Operators don't see **highest-priority action** on login (approvals, deliverables, shoot plan).

**Fix:** DC parity upgrade on existing route — preserve IPI-11 zero-brand → onboarding redirect.

---

## User story

> As an **operator**, when I open FashionOS after login,  
> I see my portfolio hero, recent work, and pending approvals with clear next actions,  
> so I can decide what to do in one glance without hunting workspace cards.

---

## Design reference

| Source | Path |

## Scope

* Wrap `/app` in **OperatorShell** (DESIGN-030)

* **ApprovalCard** on dashboard when pending (compact → large)
* **production-planner** context + contextual chips (not generic greeting)
* **5 states** + mobile shell pattern
* Preserve **IPI-11** redirect

## Out of scope

* EvidenceBlock modal wiring → IPI-172
* Playwright bootstrap → IPI-258 (manual smoke OK for MVP)

Title: SCR-21 · Booking Wizard
Description:
## SCR-21 — Booking Wizard

**Priority:** P2 · **Blocked by:** [IPI-397](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-397/be-b0b-booking-mastra-agent-draft-only) (BE-B0b Booking Mastra agent) · **Dependencies:** SCR-20 (Talent Profile) · [IPI-385](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-385/rf-01-extract-statuschip-crm-status-tokens)/386/387 (shared atoms)

**SSOT:** `Universal-design-prompt-new/tasks/screens/SCR-21-booking-wizard.md`

**Route:** `/app/matching/talent/[id]/book` (greenfield — does not exist)

**Design source:** `Pages/Shoot Wizard.v2.image-first.dc.html` (authoring shortcut — different route context, same wizar layout)

**Current state:** 🔴 No route exists. No BookingWizard component exists. No booking agent exists (BE-B0b, [IPI-397](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-397/be-b0b-booking-mastra-agent-draft-only), 🔴 Not Started).

---

## Overview

Multi-step booking wizard: select talent (from SCR-09/20), set rate/dates/message, AI-drafts a booking quote via the booking Mastra agent, operator reviews and confirms via HITL. Booking agent **never writes directly to DB** — operator approves via ApprovalCard before `transition_booking` RPC.

## Purpose

Operator creates a booking request for a talent profile in a guided wizard with AI assistance.

## User journey

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  A[Talent profile SCR-20] -->|"Request booking" CTA| B[Booking wizard /app/matching/talent/[id]/book]
  B --> C[Step 1: Select shoot context]
  C --> D[Step 2: Set rate + dates + message]
  D --> E[Step 3: AI drafts quote via booking agent]
  E --> F[HITL review: ApprovalCard]
  F -->|Approve| G[create_booking_request RPC]
  F -->|Edit| D
  F -->|Reject| H[Cancelled state]
  G --> I[Booking detail /app/bookings/[id]]
```

## Component reuse verification

| Component | Usage | Reuse from |
| -- | -- | -- |
| WizardShell | Full-screen step container | RF-A1 (future — currently embedded in shoots/new) |
| EmptyState | Empty step data | RF-A7b |
| ErrorState | API error | RF-A7b |
| ApprovalCard | HITL draft review | Existing component |
| StatusChip | Booking status | RF-01 |
| Chat dock | Booking agent context | Existing, agentId=`booking` |
| N/A | NO custom wizard logic | Uses WizardShell pattern |
| N/A | NO new RPC | Uses existing `create_booking_request` |

## Backend data

| Data | Source | Status |
| -- | -- | -- |
| Talent profile | `search_talent` | 🟢 live |
| Booking create | `create_booking_request` RPC | 🟢 live |
| Booking agent | Mastra `booking` agent (draft-only) | 🔴 [IPI-397](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-397/be-b0b-booking-mastra-agent-draft-only) — not started |
| Availability | `talent.talent_availability` | 🟢 live |
| Pricing | Talent profile rate fields | 🟢 live |
| Transition | `transition_booking` RPC | 🟢 live |

## Acceptance criteria

| # | Criterion | Proof |
| -- | -- | -- |
| 1 | Route `/app/matching/talent/[id]/book` exists | browser navigates |
| 2 | Multi-step wizard: select shoot, set rate/dates/message, review | steps navigable |
| 3 | AI assistant (booking agent) drafts booking message + rate quote | agent context in chat |
| 4 | HITL review: ApprovalCard shows draft with Approve/Edit/Reject | HITL gate functional |
| 5 | Approve → `create_booking_request` RPC, redirects to booking detail | API called |
| 6 | Edit returns to rate/dates step with draft pre-filled | preserved state |
| 7 | Reject shows cancelled state | clean end state |
| 8 | Loading/error states per step | skeleton + error |
| 9 | tokens.css only — no legacy hex | grep check |

## Booking agent boundaries (from BE-B0b spec)

* Agent **never writes directly to DB** — no `create_booking_request` or `transition_booking` in tools
* Only reads: talent profile, availability, rate cards
* Only drafts: message text, rate quote, availability proposal
* All writes go through HITL → user-clicked ApprovalCard → API route → RPC

## Mobile & a11y

| # | Requirement |
| -- | -- |
| 1 | Full-screen wizard, no tab bar on step 0 |
| 2 | Keyboard-aware footer (fields not hidden behind keyboard) |
| 3 | Progress/save indicator between steps |
| 4 | Each step has a clear heading and purpose |
| 5 | Touch targets >=44px |

```bash
cd app && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && CI=true npm run build
```

* Payment/invoicing
* Calendar sync
* Mobile shell (<1024px)

| 🔴 BLOCKER: Booking agent ([IPI-397](https://linear.app/amo100/issue/IPI-397/be-b0b-booking-mastra-agent-draft-only)) not started | Cannot build wizard without agent for draft; UI scaffolding possible but agent is gating |
| WizardShell not yet extracted (RF-A1 deferred) | Build standalone client wizard; extraction is follow-up |
